message:
fix(engine): harden hash computations with length-prefixed encoding in law_mining, opportunity_matrix, and cache_oblivious_metadata_substrate

Continues the length-prefixed hash hardening campaign started in the
previous session's signature_drift_gate and semantic_flattening_inventory
changes.

law_mining:
- Add push_string_len helper that writes (len as u64 LE || bytes) for
  every variable-length string field, replacing bare extend_from_slice
- Apply length-prefixed encoding to all string fields in LawProvenanceSource,
  LawProvenanceRecord, CandidateScopeHypothesis, LawCandidate, InvariantSeed,
  NormalFormHypothesis, and LawMiningCatalog hash computations
- Add collection-length prefixes before iterating over vectors of hashes
- Refactor push_strings to use push_string_len internally
- Refactor hashed_id to use push_string_len and include prefix/parts count
  in the hash input; widen ID suffix from 12 to 16 hex chars for lower
  collision probability
- Update test fixtures for new deterministic hash values

opportunity_matrix:
- Add hash_update_str helper that writes (len as u64 LE || bytes) to a
  Sha256 hasher
- Apply to all string fields in build_matrix_id (trace_id, decision_id,
  policy_id, optimization_run_id, hotspot module/function, candidate
  opportunity_id/target_module/target_function)
- Remove two unused fields (security_clearance_millionths,
  engineering_effort_hours_millionths) from the hash input that were
  already removed from the struct

cache_oblivious_metadata_substrate:
- Add evidence count prefix before hashing evidence entries in
  run_cache_oblivious_corpus inventory hash

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
